Alter EgoAbout

FREE, forever. Paste nothing — just answer 5 quick, revealing questions. In under a minute you see your Alter Ego card (your coined archetype, a one-line metaphor, a few traits, a motto). Enter your email and, right on screen, you get your full reading PLUS two more cards worth posting: your Friend Group Ego (who you are to the people around you) and your Shadow Ego (the person you almost were). The email is the only ask, and it is the delivery of real extra value, not a gate. There is NO paid tier now (deliberate — this is an audience play). The only CTA is soft: "built by Scott MacLean, who runs a one-person company of AI agents — see what else the machine builds" -> macleanmarket.com + an optional subscribe. Designed from day one to also be GIFTABLE as a free add-on bonus that can bolt onto any future MacLean offer.
